certificate.caveat: When operated in FIPS mode. The module generates cryptographic keys whose strengths are modified by available entropy. No assurance of the minimum strength of generated keys
certificate.description: The DragonWave® Secure Cryptographic Module is a hybrid cryptographic module consisting of firmware and hardware. The hardware portion of the module provides AES for bulk data encryption between two Horizon Compact+ or Horizon Quantum peer devices in a radio link, while the firmware provides cryptographic state management as well as secure peer-to-peer management communications over a protected TLS tunnel.
security_level_exceptions: Tested: Horizon Quantum (PN 60-000471-03) and Horizon Compact+ (PN CP-HP-18-B1-S-X-010-N-00-R1) with QNX Neutrino Real-Time Operating System Version 6.4.1

validation_history.lab: CGI Information Systems & Management Consultants Inc
